# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an unpublished research manuscript with a concrete empirical study, explicit dataset construction, and reported results about adoption, structure, and evolution of AI configuration files across 466 open-source software projects. That clears the institute threshold for real evidentiary substance.

## Limits
